block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Elon Musk issued an ultimatum to Tesla remote workers on Wednesday – they should spend at least 40 hours a week in the office. The share price fell by $30 immediately after the news, but this did not affect the market much.
block_07: The share price has rebounded after shareholders approved the 20-for-1 stock split, announced in March – plus 11% this week. Will the trend continue until the end of the month?
block_10: The company's per-share loss was almost five times as big as analysts had expected  – the share price fell by 12% this week. Will the situation change before the end of Q2?
block_14: Stay tuned for emails, so you don't miss all the updates that are coming this year.
